section_miscategorizations.text: I am continuing the patient on omeprazole 20 milligrams daily.
section_miscategorizations.reason: This could ambiguously represent either a continuation order (plan) or simply documenting an existing medication. Given the explicit 'I am continuing' wording, it is acceptable as a plan item, but some readers might expect unchanged home meds to be documented in S, making this a minor organizational issue rather than a clear error.
